_note: Sourced reference tables for the SF 150-year budget timeline (export_sf_timeline.py). NOTHING here is hardcoded from memory: CPI-U 1913-2025 was pulled from the BLS public API (series CUUR0000SA0, annual average, base 1982-84=100); pre-1913 values are the Federal Reserve Bank of Minneapolis long-run CPI estimate (1967=100) chain-spliced to the BLS base at 1913 (x 9.9/29.7). Population is the U.S. decennial Census count for the City & County of San Francisco; intercensal years are linearly interpolated by the export and flagged.
generated_by: gen_seeds.py — BLS API pull + Minneapolis Fed splice, 2026-07-23

deflator.index: US CPI-U (All Urban Consumers, U.S. city average, All items)
deflator.source: 1913-2025: U.S. Bureau of Labor Statistics, CPI-U series CUUR0000SA0, annual average. Pre-1913: Federal Reserve Bank of Minneapolis long-run CPI estimate (Warren-Pearson / historical splice, 1967=100), rescaled to the 1982-84=100 base by chain-splicing at 1913.

population.series: City and County of San Francisco, U.S. decennial Census population
population.source: U.S. Census Bureau, decennial census counts for the City and County of San Francisco.
population.method: Decennial census counts. Intercensal years for a timeline point are linearly interpolated between the two bracketing censuses; years after the latest census use that census count.
